data.title: Hawkish Powell Aside, This Analyst Expects 4 Fed Rate Cuts In 2025: Here's Why
data.description: Even as the Fed's December dot plot projects only two additional 25-basis-point cuts in 2025, Louis Navellier says he expects four rate cuts in 2025.

data.title: Cathie Wood Says Bitcoin Is 'More Scarce Than Gold' — Predicts M&A Surge Under Trump 2.0
data.description: Cathie Wood, the founder of Ark Investment Management LLC, predicts a surge in mergers and acquisitions after President-elect Donald Trump defeats Vice President Kamala Harris in the 2024 election.

MKBHD's Smartphone Of The Year 2024 Is Here, And Apple Fans Won't Be Happy
data.description: Marques Brownlee named the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra as his Smartphone of the Year 2024 for its all-around excellence, outshining competitors like the iPhone 16 and Google Pixel 9 Pro Fold across multiple categories.
